title: Drink and Doodle Vol. 124 at ABV Gallery
description: Saturday-night live art event with 40+ artists drawing and painting at the same time, plus music, drinks, and a gallery you can actually buy from. You don't need to be good — paper, markers, and drinks flowing all night. Big shared-interests overlap: paintings/art made in front of you, live music in the room, and a relaxed social vibe. Pairs naturally with a late dinner afterward in West Midtown.
vibe: Loose, creative, social — for couples who want to make something together without it being a class

title: Saturday Tropical Elegance — Latin Night + Lesson
description: Saturday Latin Night with a beginner salsa/bachata lesson at 8 PM, then open social dancing till late. Hosted by the Atlanta Salsa & Bachata Meetup group. Lesson means you don't need experience — they rotate partners, so it's friendly and low-pressure. Perfect for the dancing + live music combo, and you can grab a bite at a veg-friendly spot in the same corridor before or after.
location: Atlanta (midtown venue — see Meetup link for exact address)
vibe: Warm, physical, playful — for couples who want to actually dance, not just watch

title: Plant-Based Date Night Cooking Class (Cozymeal)
description: Hands-on plant-based cooking class built for two — 2.5 hours, chef-led, all ingredients included, you eat what you make. Hits cooking + vegetarian food + quality time in one block. Menu rotates but always fully veg, often vegan. Great daytime alternative if you want a slower, more intimate Saturday — finish around 3 PM and you've still got the whole evening.
location: Chef's venue in Atlanta (booked via Cozymeal, exact address sent on confirmation)
vibe: Intimate, hands-on, collaborative — for couples who'd rather cook together than be waited on
